name: Lake Sonoma Marina
tagline: Healdsburg's premier marina — boat rentals on Lake Sonoma, open year-round.
seoDescription: Lake Sonoma Marina — boat rentals (pontoons, ski & fishing boats, kayaks, jet skis), day-use picnic areas & deli on Lake Sonoma in Geyserville, near Healdsburg, CA.

hero.heading: Your day on Lake Sonoma starts here.
hero.subheading: Healdsburg's premier marina — pontoons, ski boats, fishing boats, kayaks and jet skis, plus picnic areas and an on-site deli. Open year-round in the heart of Sonoma County.

images.heroAlt: Lake Sonoma Marina in Geyserville & Healdsburg, CA

about.heading: In the heart of Sonoma County
body: Lake Sonoma Marina sits on the shore of one of Sonoma County's most beautiful lakes, just up the road from downtown Healdsburg. We're open year-round and rent everything you need for a day on the water — patio pontoons, ski and tubing boats, fishing boats, kayaks, paddle boards, and jet skis.

Not into boating? Pull up to a day-use picnic area with BBQ pits and volleyball, grab a sandwich and a cold drink from the deli, and make a day of it. Whether you're chasing bass at sunrise or pulling the kids on a tube all afternoon, we'll get you out on the water.

services.title: Pontoon (patio) boats
services.description: Cruise in comfort — patio pontoons for half-day, full-day, or overnight on the lake. Perfect for groups and lazy afternoons.

services.title: Fishing boats
services.description: Quiet 3-person fishing boats for a morning chasing bass on Lake Sonoma. Half-day, full-day, or overnight.

services.title: Premium sport boats
services.description: 8-person sport boats built for a full day of fun on the water — half- and full-day rentals.

services.title: Watersport & tubing boats
services.description: 7-person ski, wakeboard, and tubing boats so the whole crew can get out and ride.

services.title: Kayaks, paddle boards & jet skis
services.description: Kayaks, paddle boards, canoes, and jet skis — paddle the quiet coves or open up the throttle.

services.title: Day-use, BBQ & deli
services.description: Picnic areas with BBQ pits and volleyball, plus an on-site deli for sandwiches, hotdogs, and cold drinks (beer & wine included).

hoursNote: Reservations recommended in summer — call (707) 433-2200 to book your boat.

sections.heading: Everything at the marina
sections.intro: Rent it by the half-day, full-day, or overnight — or just come for the shore.

sections.heading: On Lake Sonoma, near it all
sections.note: 4200 Skaggs Springs Road, Geyserville — about 20 minutes from downtown Healdsburg.

items.q: Do I need to reserve a boat?
items.a: Reservations are recommended, especially summer weekends and holidays — call (707) 433-2200 to lock in your boat.
Pontoon, fishing, sport, and ski/tubing boats, plus kayaks, paddle boards, canoes, and jet skis. We also offer boat storage and HydroHoist lifts.
Yes — our deli has sandwiches, hotdogs, snacks, and cold drinks including beer and wine, so you can provision before you launch.
4200 Skaggs Springs Road, Geyserville, CA, on the shore of Lake Sonoma — roughly 20 minutes from downtown Healdsburg.
